technicalDoc.title: Playwright run — Core Technical Documentation
technicalDoc.summary: Technical reference for Playwright run — Core, generated from architecture, planning, execution, and project review artifacts.

sections.heading: System Overview
sections.content: Projektweite Kernarchitektur fuer UI, API und Datenhaltung. System shape: Monorepo mit UI, API und gemeinsamer Datenhaltung.

sections.heading: Implementation Waves
sections.content: The implementation plan shipped 2 wave(s). Wave 1: Kern-Workflow liefern (US-01). Wave 2: Uebersicht und Bearbeitung fertigstellen (US-02, US-03).

sections.heading: Execution Outcome
sections.content: 2 story branches reached a passed state. Blocked stories remain: US-03.

sections.heading: Architecture Decisions
sections.content: Frontend: Kern-Workflow und Listenansichten; Backend: Validierung, Speicherung und Workflow-Logik; Storage: Dauerhafte Ablage von Eintraegen und Status

sections.heading: Known Risks
sections.content: low maintainability: Shared helper logic appears duplicated in multiple modules.

sections.heading: Update Mode
sections.content: This run updated the technical documentation for Playwright run — Core using the latest workflow artifacts.

featuresDoc.title: Playwright run — Core Features Documentation
featuresDoc.summary: Feature and scope summary for Playwright run — Core, derived from the PRD and execution results.

sections.heading: Implemented Features
sections.content: US-01: Nutzer sieht den Kern-Workflow als gefuehrte Eingabemaske; US-02: Nutzer sieht eine Uebersicht ueber bestehende Eintraege; US-03: Nutzer kann einen Eintrag anlegen und speichern

sections.heading: Supported User Flows
sections.content: Wave 1 delivers Kern-Workflow liefern; Wave 2 delivers Uebersicht und Bearbeitung fertigstellen

sections.heading: Scope Notes
sections.content: The shipped scope is complete for the planned stories, with low-risk technical cleanup remaining.
